published_parameter_counts.hidden_completion_original: trivial hidden bundle and unbroken E8 N=1 super-Yang-Mills, plus bulk M5-branes that cancel the remaining anomaly class
published_parameter_counts.one_higgs_locus: codimension-two locus in the invariant extension-moduli space
published_parameter_counts.visible_massless_spectrum: three chiral families, one massless Higgs-pair stratum, and no massless visible exotics
